task_completion.description: Verify that the scenario with the missing ownship model (Legacy_Fatal_Error) was moved to the Quarantine directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file manager or terminal command (e.g., `ls /home/ga/Quarantine`) confirming that the `Legacy_Fatal_Error` directory is now located in `/home/ga/Quarantine/`.

task_completion.description: Verify that the missing tug model in the othership.ini file of Legacy_Missing_Tug was replaced with 'Tug'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of `Legacy_Missing_Tug/othership.ini` (via text editor, `cat`, or script output) with a ship type set to 'Tug'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the missing generic model in the othership.ini file of Legacy_Unknown_Ship was replaced with 'Coaster'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of `Legacy_Unknown_Ship/othership.ini` (via text editor, `cat`, or script output) with a ship type set to 'Coaster'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a description.txt file with the text 'Legacy scenario restored by automated audit.' was added to all remaining scenarios.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the creation or contents of `description.txt` in the remaining scenario directories (`Legacy_Missing_Tug`, `Legacy_Unknown_Ship`, `Legacy_Valid_Archive`), containing the exact required text.

task_completion.description: Verify that an audit report was generated at /home/ga/Documents/audit_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal output displaying the contents of `/home/ga/Documents/audit_report.txt`, which should detail the actions taken during the audit.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually modified the files and directories rather than just printing the expected output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like `mv`, `sed`, `echo`, or a script being executed that performs file operations, rather than just `echo`ing the final report.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent checked the Models directory to determine which models were missing, rather than hardcoding the scenario names.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like `ls /opt/bridgecommand/Models` or script logic that compares ship names against the contents of the Models directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the audit report reflects the actual actions taken.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report contents should match the operations performed on the specific scenarios, not just a generic copy-paste of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Models directory contains exactly four valid models: Coaster, Ferry, Tug, and Yacht. There are four scenarios initially: Legacy_Fatal_Error (missing ownship, must be quarantined), Legacy_Missing_Tug (missing othership tug, must be changed to 'Tug'), Legacy_Unknown_Ship (missing othership generic, must be changed to 'Coaster'), and Legacy_Valid_Archive (all models valid). The quarantine directory is /home/ga/Quarantine/.
